prompt: Make the cat looks more friendly by adding a smile and brightening its colors. Ensure the changes blend seamlessly with the original art style.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, a traditional Japanese painting of a white and black cat, by subtly adding a gentle smile to the cat's face to make its expression appear more friendly. Simultaneously, brighten the colors of the cat's fur, especially the white and light-grey areas, ensuring the modifications seamlessly integrate with the existing art style and distinctive brushwork of the original artwork.
objects: Cat's fur with brighter white and light-grey areas
